/usr/bin/cc -fPIC    -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/fast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/fast_lio_sam_g/msg/detail/pose6_d__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jacky/workspace/build/fast_lio_sam_g:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libfast_lio_sam_g__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
